rationale: The citing paper is an editorial/content-coding review of JMR articles (2013–2019), and its stated prior-work anchor is mainly the historical JMR review by Huber, Kamakura, and Mela (2014), not this LDA article specifically. Since the matched evidence is only a bare DOI reference (no in-text context/quotation), this could be either an exemplar mention of a JMR article or a more substantive methodological touchpoint, so it is not safe to drop confidently.
